name: vikunja-mcp
description: MCP server for managing tasks in a Vikunja instance over its REST API (stdio; write-only, no delete).

vikunja_url.title: Vikunja URL
vikunja_url.description: Base http(s) URL of your Vikunja instance, e.g. https://vikunja.example.com

vikunja_api_token.title: Vikunja API token
vikunja_api_token.description: Project-scoped service-account API token. Stored in the OS keychain, injected at launch.
